name: Altshuler Shaham Provident Funds and Pension Ltd
summary: Altshuler Shaham Provident Funds and Pension Ltd is a publicly owned investment manager. It invests in markets across the globe. The firm's investment strategies focus on long-term vision and maximizing asset potential over time. Altshuler Shaham Provident Funds and Pension Ltd was founded in 1990 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel.
